title: Household Tales
author: Jacob Grimm
description: Hardcover reprint of the original 1884 edition - beautifully bound in brown cloth covers featuring titles stamped in gold, 8vo - 6x9. No adjustments have been made to the original text, giving readers the full antiquarian experience. For quality purposes, all text and images are printed as black and white. This item is printed on demand. Book Information: Grimm, Jacob. Grimm's Household Tales: With The Author's Notes, Volume 2. Indiana: Repressed Publishing LLC, 2012. Original Publishing: Grimm,
